name: the-gun
description: C. J. Chivers' definitive history of the AK-47 and automatic weapons. From Hiram Maxim's first machine gun to Mikhail Kalashnikov's iconic rifle, tracing how the technology of rapid fire changed warfare and shaped the modern world.
useCase: Understand the history of automatic weapons, the AK-47's invention and global spread, and how one rifle changed the nature of war.
knownRisks: Contains graphic descriptions of combat injuries and death from firearms.
The book includes detailed technical descriptions of weapons that some readers may find disturbing.
Chivers writes from an American perspective; the coverage of the M-16 is more extensive than some international readers may expect.
